description: verify a run-ledger's structural + ordering integrity (the SV-2 'verify' act)
rules: read-only — walks the target ledger, never writes to it
a recorded refusal/waiver is evidence, not corruption (meta-rule M4)
a gap in the ok-step prefix is named as an out-of-band run
usage: Set TARGET_LEDGER (path to a run-ledger.json). Output: ledgercheck.json with {records, bad_records, chain}.
limitation: Verifies the structural chain that exists today (executor run-ledger). Cryptographic prev/HMAC chain checks (the torture / crashloop perks) arrive with Ledger-v2 (plan P1).
